description: A designed graphic with a dark brick-wall background. A white instant-photo frame holds a booking-style portrait of a young man with dark wavy hair in a white shirt, captioned 'FENTANYL DISTRIBUTION' in handwriting-style text. Below is a 'Worst of the Worst' logo with a 'Portland' label and an ICE logo.
notable_text: FENTANYL DISTRIBUTION; Worst of the Worst; Portland; ICE
